visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins with a close-up shot focusing on a white bowl containing a small amount of orange-colored liquid. A fair-skinned hand enters the frame, holding a crispy piece of golden-brown fried dough (youtiao) and dipping it into the broth. The background is a dark, cluttered tabletop of a restaurant, with metal tongs and white plates visible. (2) The camera cuts to a medium shot of a young person wearing a beige baseball cap and a light-colored t-shirt. They look directly into the camera with a serious, intense expression while holding a piece of youtiao with metal tongs in front of their face. The background features traditional-style Chinese decor with wooden lattices and warm ambient lighting. (3) The shot changes to a medium close-up of another young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top. She is shown happily biting into a piece of the soaked youtiao, closing her eyes as she chews. The lighting is bright and warm, highlighting the texture of the food and the person's satisfied facial expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 油條沾火鍋湯頭吃 是否邪教!?. [Variety]: Yes 💢 / No 😋. (2) [Subtitle]: (台灣朋友). (3) [Subtitle]: 📷 韓國人.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 hand dipping food in phase 1, 1 female character in phase 2, 1 female character in phase 3.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a beige cap and light t-shirt with a focused expression; another young woman with long dark hair wearing a black outfit eating food.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a hotpot restaurant featuring dark tabletops, traditional wooden wall decorations, and warm studio-like artificial lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio consists entirely of a high-energy, rhythmic K-pop style electronic track. It features a bright, synthesized bass line and crisp electronic drums. A female vocal sample repetitively chants rhythmic syllables in Korean, synchronized perfectly with the driving 4/4 beat. There is no foreground human speech or ambient environmental noise, indicating a clean, post-produced master track used for social media content. The music maintains a constant tempo and intensity throughout the entire duration.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To playfully question a controversial food-eating habit—dipping fried dough into hotpot broth—by contrasting the intense/skeptical reaction of a Taiwanese friend with the joyful acceptance of a Korean friend, encouraging audience engagement on the topic.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a popular social media format where a question is posed to the audience, followed by character reactions that represent different cultural or personal viewpoints on food etiquette.
